data.body:
Decision log (var 13):
13. REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE -> MODIFY/RENAME: REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS (boolean true/false, default false). It is a TEMPORARY BYPASS of the rebar-id label-write authorization guard (the identity primitive binding local tickets<->Jira issues), NOT a persistent 'mode' — leaving it on risks duplicate/orphaned issues. Semantics: false => guard active (old 'raise', fail-closed); true => bypass (old 'warn': log+allow). Config key: reconciler.id_guard_bypass_unsafe. Emit a LOUD warning every sync while engaged. Alias old env REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE + config rebar_id_guard_mode (value map: raise->false, warn->true) during deprecation. Values move from raise/warn to true/false.
